summary: Iteration 3 PASSED. All requested NEW features (AI Insight Card, Charts section, Daily Expenses widget) work end-to-end on the Expo web build at viewport 414x800 logged-in as user@paydone.id / user (u2). Local-fallback insight is correctly used because backend /api/ai/analyze returns 402 for u2; refresh button shows the expected 'AI Premium 🔒 — Upgrade untuk insight personal' error row. Donut, expense-breakdown (conditional), and cashflow charts render with correct totals/legends. Daily-expense bottom sheet opens, all 6 category chips exist, both validation messages fire via window.confirm fallback, successful save persists the new expense (TestExp-<ts>) and reveals chart-expense-breakdown afterwards. FAB speed dial now exposes the 3 new actions. Regression on bottom-tab navigation (Home/Strategi/Action Plan/Profile) still works.

minor.issue: Returns 402 (Payment Required) for test user u2 — expected per problem statement. Frontend correctly falls back to local heuristic insight. No fix needed on frontend.

issues: Test user u2 currently has total cicilan Rp 26.8jt vs monthly Pemasukan Rp 5jt → DSR = 537% which the ring renders as '537%'. The math is correct (it's seed data) but the ring visual was designed for 0-100% — value gets clamped to 100% fill but the numeric label 537% can look broken. Optional: cap displayed text at e.g. '>100%' or re-render with a different layout when value > 100. Cosmetic only.

Non-blocking RN-web warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated, 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated, 'TouchableWithoutFeedback' deprecated, 'useNativeDriver not supported on web' (BottomSheet animations fall back to JS). All are RN-web noise, not functional issues.

action_items: (OPTIONAL/COSMETIC) DSR ring visual when value > 100% — show '>100%' or scale stroke differently so it doesn't look like a parsing bug.

(LOW) Carry-over from iteration 2: bottom tabs still have no data-testid; navigation tested via URL (/strategi, /action-plan, /profile, /). Adding data-testid='tab-home|tab-strategi|tab-action-plan|tab-profile' to /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx would simplify automation.
critical_code_review_comments: AIInsightCard.tsx: useEffect dep array is intentionally empty with eslint-disable — this is fine for once-on-mount auto-generation but means metric changes won't re-trigger AI. Consider depending on user.id only or document this. Currently working as designed.
InputDailyExpenseSheet.tsx: `parseNumeric` is called twice on every keystroke (in onChangeText and again to format) — works but slightly wasteful. Functional, no bug.

index.tsx (Home) is now ~660 lines and handles 4 sheets + 3 charts + 3 sections — consider splitting Charts block + DSRRing into separate files for maintainability (still under the 700-line guideline but trending up).

callAI() in services/ai.ts treats 402 AND 403 as AILimitError — that is correct for upgrade-required, but a true 403 (forbidden, e.g. expired session) is also swallowed as 'limit'. Minor — could differentiate auth vs quota.

AIInsightCard auto-fires generate() on mount even when localInsight is sufficient — every Home mount = 1 backend POST that 402's for u2. Consider gating auto-fire behind `aiText === null && !aiError && hasQuota` flag in storage to avoid hammering /api/ai/analyze on every render.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 daily expense on prod for u2: title 'TestExp-1778154376', amount Rp 25.000, category Food, today's date. NOT cleaned up (no delete UI for daily expenses yet — verify with main agent if cleanup tooling is needed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://54d8c3ef-ff58-4718-898d-fbc6e6991dcc.preview.emergentagent.com. Login is pre-filled — single click on 'Masuk' text. Backend /api/ai/analyze returns 402 for u2 → AI card always falls back to local insight; the title 'INSIGHT FINANSIAL' (vs 'AI ANALYST · GEMINI') indicates fallback was used. window.confirm/window.alert is the cross-platform pattern (registered via page.on('dialog')). chart-expense-breakdown is conditionally rendered (only when monthlyExpenses > 0). Donut center has `Rp <total>` text + 'Total' subtitle. After saving an expense via dailyexp-sheet, the new card has testid `expense-item-de-<timestamp>` and the breakdown chart appears.

verified_flows.ai_insight_local_fallback_text: PASS ('INSIGHT FINANSIAL' label, contextual DSR-based body)
verified_flows.chart_debt_distribution_renders: PASS (donut + legend KPR 87% / KKB 13%, Rp 873.6jt center)
verified_flows.dailyexp_successful_save: PASS (TestExp-1778154376 / Rp 25.000 / Food saved, sheet closes, item appears)

rca of the issue: No bugs found this iteration. Local-fallback path is the intended behavior for u2 (quota-exhausted account); backend 402 is propagated as AILimitError which the UI surfaces in the error row exactly as specified.
